title: Eragrostis abortiva
taxonomy: Eragrostis abortiva is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its grass-like appearance and the structure of its flowers and leaves. Eragrostis abortiva is further classified in the genus Eragrostis, which comprises a large number of grass species. The genus Eragrostis is placed in the subfamily Chloridoideae, which includes many warm-season grasses. Overall, the classification of Eragrostis abortiva reflects its botanical relationships and evolutionary history.
